title: Murray High stunned in final
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - George Royal Academy...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - George Royal Academy edged out Murray High School 1-0 in a thrilling Kay Motsepe Regional U19 Schools Cup final at Kwanokuthula Stadium this past Saturday.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - George Royal Academy edged out Murray High School 1-0 in a thrilling Kay Motsepe Regional U19 Schools Cup final at Kwanokuthula Stadium this past Saturday."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Liyema Tukwayo scored the only goal of the match in the opening 20 minutes, beating Murray High goalkeeper Aqhamile Mooi."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Despite a late push led by Zukisani Mdyesha and Lakhiwe Menze, Murray High couldn't find an equaliser.","html":"Despite a late push led by Zukisani Mdyesha and Lakhiwe Menze, Murray High couldn't find an equaliser."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Earlier in the day, Murray High reached the final after a 1-0 semi-final win over Hillcrest High, thanks to a goal from Ikho Ntsuntsu.","html":"Earlier in the day, Murray High reached the final after a 1-0 semi-final win over Hillcrest High, thanks to a goal from Ikho Ntsuntsu."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Team captain Sithenkosi Ngqalula was instrumental throughout the tournament.","html":"Team captain Sithenkosi Ngqalula was instrumental throughout the tournament."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The final saw strong performances from both sides, with Gift Dlala and Sange Manzi controlling midfield for the Academy, while Ayabonga Mkontwana and Ikho Ntsuntsu battled hard for Murray High.","html":"The final saw strong performances from both sides, with Gift Dlala and Sange Manzi controlling midfield for the Academy, while Ayabonga Mkontwana and Ikho Ntsuntsu battled hard for Murray High."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George Royal Academy now advances to the provincial stage in Beaufort West.","html":"George Royal Academy now advances to the provincial stage in Beaufort West."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
